svg.title: Bones composition scheme of adult male mummy of Cladh-Hallan

cc:Work.dc:description: Composition of bones of adult male mummy of Cladh-Hallan according to: Jayd Hanna, Abigail S. Bouwman, Keri A. Brown, Mike Parker Pearson, Trence A. Brown: Ancient DNA typing shows that a Bronze Age mummy is a composite of different skeletons. In: Journal of Archaeological Science. 2012, ISSN 0305-4403, p. 2774-2779.
